title: Positive flow: Navigating through different tabs
test_steps: Open the CW Seed app. | Tap on the 'INFO' tab. | Tap on the 'SETTINGS' tab. | Tap on the 'MORE APPS' tab.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the 'INFO' tab. | The app should navigate to the 'SETTINGS' tab. | The app should navigate to the 'MORE APPS' tab.

title: Negative flow: Attempting to navigate to a non-existent tab
test_steps: Open the CW Seed app. | Tap on the 'INFO' tab. | Attempt to tap on a non-existent tab.
expected_result: The app should not navigate to a non-existent tab.

title: Positive flow: Interacting with list options
test_steps: Open the CW Seed app. | Tap on the 'INFO' tab. | Tap on 'Send Feedback'. | Tap on 'Rate This App'. | Tap on 'Share This App'. | Tap on 'About CW Seed'. | Tap on 'Legal'. | Tap on 'FAQ'.
expected_result: The app should display the feedback form. | The app should display the rating form. | The app should display the sharing options. | The app should display the 'About CW Seed' page. | The app should display the 'Legal' page. | The app should display the 'FAQ' page.

title: Negative flow: Attempting to interact with non-existent list options
test_steps: Open the CW Seed app. | Tap on the 'INFO' tab. | Attempt to tap on a non-existent list option.
expected_result: The app should not display a non-existent list option.

title: Positive flow: Verifying app version
test_steps: Open the CW Seed app. | Tap on the 'INFO' tab. | Verify that the app version (v1.1.260) is displayed.
expected_result: The app version (v1.1.260) should be displayed.

title: Negative flow: Attempting to interact with the app version
test_steps: Open the CW Seed app. | Tap on the 'INFO' tab. | Attempt to interact with the app version (v1.1.260).
expected_result: The app should not allow interaction with the app version.

title: Positive flow: Verifying header/App Bar
test_steps: Open the CW Seed app. | Verify that the CW Seed logo is displayed in the header/App Bar.
expected_result: The CW Seed logo should be displayed in the header/App Bar.

title: Negative flow: Attempting to interact with the CW Seed logo
test_steps: Open the CW Seed app. | Attempt to interact with the CW Seed logo.
expected_result: The app should not allow interaction with the CW Seed logo.
